title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Judge, Luffy, Sanji, Pudding, Vinsmoke Family as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Quit Dreaming, you fool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Me, marrying that little punk?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Never in a billion years!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm one of Mama's "favorites", you know? She especially loves how good I am at acting. :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's been pampering me so much lately that I'm actu- ally starting to get a little sick of her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when Mama asked me to trick that man, I knew it would be an easy task! The straw hats ended up being quite simple- minded, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My family members are the only ones who know my true nature!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Prisoner's Library.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, stop! You're seri-ously going to injure yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Fucking pudding...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive her either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so don't worry. I won't be marrying Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Listen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The reason why I'll never marry him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is because that shot-nosed idiot who's head over heels for me right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is gonna get shot to death by me...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: During the wedding ceremony!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You kids aren't gonna get out of here alive, either.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on, pudding! What the hell are you saying?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Good- bye...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You filthy little rats!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bastard was planning on tricking us from the start!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did Sanji ever do to her?! (that fucking bitch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all are naive! An "evil army", you say?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, I was in the morning. I was

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay in your dreams like the idiots you are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama's aim from the start is to get her hands on a "clonable army".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She needs to get her hands on the "science" you all are in possession of!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...what a beautiful personality you have.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, are you trying to diss me now? If you have nothing nice to say, I won't listen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: to a word you say.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The entirety of the German kingdom is parked right here, within our territory.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just as planned. With bait as sweet as Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no wonder we've managed to lure in all of you puny flies! :)

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: During the wedding tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Know that we plan on massacing...

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: The entire Vinsmoke family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a single ray of hope, left in this world.»

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
